title: Funnel
description: A funnel that drop items below it
body:
# Funnel

![Version 1.0.0](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-1.0.0-brightgreen)
![MC 1.16.5](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.16.5-blue)
![MC 1.18.2](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.18.2-blue)


This mod add a funnel block that drop items inside it below it one by one. Can be turned off by powering it with
redstone.

### Recipe
![](https://i.imgur.com/zHoZM2G.png)


### Downloads
[Available on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/funnel)

[Available on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/funnel)

[Available on Github](https://github.com/Slexom/funnel/releases)
